headline: Is Ford Motor (F) Creating An Opportunity After Its Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Ford Motor's current share price reflects its underlying value, you are not alone. This article is set up to help you put some structure around that question. Over the past year the stock is up 26.1%, even though it has seen a 4.0% decline over the last 7 days and a 17.4% decline over the last 30 days, with year to date returns at a 12.5% decline based on a recent close of US$11.67. Recent headlines around Ford Motor have focused on the company as a major U.S...

headline: Did Ford’s New Co‑Branded Credit Card Just Redraw Bread Financial Holdings’ (BFH) Consumer Finance Map?
summary: On March 10, 2026, Ford Motor Company announced a long-term partnership with Bread Financial to launch a co-branded Ford Rewards Visa Signature credit card and integrated installment loan program, offering flexible financing for subscriptions, parts, services, and accessories both online and at dealerships across the US. An interesting angle for investors is that Bread Financial will work with Ford to use data-driven insights across channels, potentially deepening customer engagement while...
